name: Jose Danilo Narvaez Arias
role: Systems Engineer | Cloud & Telephony Infrastructure | DevOps
bio: Systems Engineer specializing in Cloud & Telephony Infrastructure and DevOps Automation. 6+ years at Emtelco building scalable VoIP systems with Asterisk, Kamailio, and SIP. Fluent in Python, Bash, and containerized deployments. Self-hoster, privacy advocate, and relentless learner pursuing AI specialization.
profileOverview: Systems Engineer specializing in scalable VoIP infrastructure, cloud automation, and AI.

experience.title: Telephony Engineer
experience.description: Design and implement enterprise SIP telephony solutions. Build WebRTC contact center platforms with Asterisk and Kamailio. Automate VoIP provisioning and monitoring with Python, Bash, and Docker. Manage Linux infrastructure, Nginx reverse proxies, and CI/CD pipelines.

experience.title: Telephony Analyst
experience.description: Analyzed and optimized telephony infrastructure. Developed Python-based automation tools for Asterisk AMI/ARI. Implemented Prometheus and Grafana dashboards for real-time VoIP monitoring. Managed SBC configurations and Genesys Cloud BYOC integrations.

experience.title: Help Desk Analyst
experience.description: Provided technical support for telephony systems and network infrastructure. Resolved escalated tickets for SIP, VoIP, and network issues. Documented processes and contributed to knowledge base development.

experience.title: Back Office Employee
experience.description: Remote technical support for Vodafone customers. Router configuration, troubleshooting connectivity issues, and Linux system optimization for network services.

experience.title: Help Desk Specialist
experience.description: 6+ years providing specialized remote support for Claro Hogar. Fixed IP configuration, DMZ and NAT setups, network optimization, and customer troubleshooting for broadband and telephony services.

education.school: UNIR | Universidad Internacional de La Rioja
education.description: Postgraduate specialization focused on Python, TensorFlow, containerized LLM environments, and DevOps for AI pipelines.
Bachelor degree in Systems Engineering. Core focus on telecommunications, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and backend development with Python and Linux.
Specialized diploma in cybersecurity operations and Cisco network defense. Training focused on CyberOps, threat analysis, and incident response.
Certification in English as a Second Language (ESL). Focused on communication for technical and professional contexts.

certifications.name: Diplomado en Habilidades Directivas y Liderazgo
certifications.issuer: UNIR | Universidad Internacional de La Rioja

certifications.name: CyberOps Associate (Cisco)
certifications.issuer: Cisco / Fundación Universitaria del Área Andina

badges.name: AWS Knowledge: Cloud Essentials - Training Badge
badges.issuer: Amazon Web Services Training and Certification

achievements.title: Automation Champion
achievements.description: Reduced manual VoIP provisioning tasks by 60% using Python and Bash automation at Emtelco.

achievements.title: Telephony Architect
achievements.description: Designed and deployed multi-tenant SIP systems using Asterisk, Kamailio, and WebRTC for enterprise contact centers.

achievements.title: DevOps Advocate
achievements.description: Containerized telephony services and optimized deployment pipelines with Docker, Nginx, and CI/CD.

achievements.title: Self-Hosting Purist
achievements.description: Runs personal infrastructure on Raspberry Pi with Traefik, Vaultwarden, and Gitea — zero third-party dependencies.

achievements.title: AI Specialization
achievements.description: Pursuing postgraduate specialization in Artificial Intelligence at UNIR with focus on TensorFlow and LLMOps.

projects.name: WebRTC Contact Center (CCaaS)
projects.description: Full-stack WebRTC contact center platform with Asterisk, Kamailio, SIP trunking, real-time supervisor dashboard, agent management, and CDR reporting. Deployed with Docker and Nginx.

projects.name: Coffee Tracker API
projects.description: Minimalist API that tracks coffee consumption with caffeine (mg) and heart rate metrics. Built with FastAPI and SQLite for data visualization and habit analysis.

projects.name: Realtime Session API
projects.description: Backend service for managing real-time telephony sessions. Developed with FastAPI and PJSIP for event tracking, session monitoring, and secure WebSocket communication.

projects.name: Prometheus Consumption API
projects.description: API for Prometheus metrics reporting and monitoring automation. Tracks resource consumption with Python scripts and Bash automation.

projects.name: API News Eventos
projects.description: Scraping API for local event aggregation and automation using FastAPI. Streamlined news and event ingestion engine.

projects.name: macOS Widget Monitor
projects.description: Native Swift widget for macOS that displays real-time system monitoring metrics. Custom-built for personal productivity tracking.

contact.text: Open to collaborations in telephony, DevOps, and AI automation. Lets build something together.
